# Summary

Describe the phase, user-facing change, and why it belongs in the locked MVP scope.

## Phase Discipline

- [ ] I did not jump phases.
- [ ] I did not add new major scope outside `docs/MVP_DEFINITION.md`.
- [ ] I updated docs for any changed behavior.

## Architecture

- [ ] I did not add UI before CLI/core support exists.
- [ ] I did not put business logic in UI shells.
- [ ] I did not hardcode one language or assume target repos are C#/.NET.
- [ ] I did not add a Visual Studio VSIX, .NET engine, cloud backend, or commercial packaging path.

## Safety

- [ ] I did not skip safety policy checks.
- [ ] I did not run destructive commands.
- [ ] I did not overwrite user files without backup behavior.
- [ ] I did not claim autonomous implementation approval or completion.

## Support Claims

- [ ] I did not claim support without sample coverage or tests.
- [ ] New language/framework/workflow claims include tests or sample evidence.

## Validation

Commands actually run:

- [ ] `npm run format`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Other:

Skipped checks and reason:

<!-- Explain any skipped checks here. Do not mark tests passing without running them. -->
